Fields.Name: Hierarchy Gain
Fields.Description: Lowering it will bring it closer to the original pose, while increasing it will make it squishier.

Fields.Name: Speed Decay
Fields.Description: The rate at which the ragdoll's movement speed is reduced. When it approaches 0, it returns slowly, and when it approaches 1, it returns suddenly.

Fields.Name: Acceleration Gain
Fields.Description: Adjustment parameter for rigid acceleration. Lower settings will make the movement softer, higher settings will make it harder. It seems to be set to a lower value than the acceleration gain.

Fields.Name: Speed Gain
Fields.Description: Rigid speed adjustment parameter. Lower settings will make the movement softer, higher settings will make it harder. It seems to be set to a lower value than the speed gain.

Fields.Name: Position Gain
Fields.Description: Adjustment parameter for rigid movement position. Lower settings will make the movement softer, higher settings will make it harder.

Fields.Name: Snap Gain
Fields.Description: Adjustment value to get closer to the original pose. Effect similar to position gain

Fields.Name: Enable Ragdoll
Fields.Description: Does it move during damage ragdoll?

Fields.Name: Mask Number per Site
Fields.Description: Mask number per site. -1: Mask disabled
